title: metretes #3355
definition:
1) a measurer, the name of a utensil known as a amphora, which
    is a species of measure used for liquids and containing
    somewhat less the nine English gallons or about (40 l)
nasbUsage:

    is a species of measure used for liquids and containing
    somewhat less the nine English gallons or about (40 l)
